mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM place WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL AND ( LOWER(TRIM(name)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{query})) OR LOWER(TRIM(address)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{query})) )
AND ( city IS NULL OR LOWER(TRIM(city)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{city})) )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN LOWER(TRIM(address)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{query})) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN city IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, id DESC

SELECT * FROM place WHERE ( LOWER(TRIM(name)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{query})) OR LOWER(TRIM(address)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{query})) )
AND ( city IS NULL OR LOWER(TRIM(city)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{city})) )
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place (name, address, city, district, country, latitude, longitude, source, external_ref, website_uri, google_maps_uri, business_status) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{city}, #{district}, #{country}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{source}, #{externalRef}, #{websiteUri}, #{googleMapsUri}, #{businessStatus}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id), name = VALUES(name), address = VALUES(address), city = VALUES(city), district = VALUES(district), country = VALUES(country), latitude = VALUES(latitude), longitude = VALUES(longitude), website_uri = VALUES(website_uri), google_maps_uri = VALUES(google_maps_uri), business_status = VALUES(business_status);

INSERT INTO place (name, address, city, district, country, latitude, longitude, source, external_ref, website_uri, google_maps_uri, business_status) VALUES
(#{p.name}, #{p.address}, #{p.city}, #{p.district}, #{p.country}, #{p.latitude}, #{p.longitude}, #{p.source}, #{p.externalRef}, #{p.websiteUri}, #{p.googleMapsUri}, #{p.businessStatus})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name), address=VALUES(address), city=VALUES(city), district=VALUES(district), country=VALUES(country), latitude=VALUES(latitude), longitude=VALUES(longitude), website_uri=VALUES(website_uri), google_maps_uri=VALUES(google_maps_uri), business_status=VALUES(business_status)
